title: ARP-OBERON 2608 Psychological Parameter Map
description: Emotional and mix-hug mapping for the hybrid instrument. Left side honors ARP 2600 semi-modular patching. Right side centers the rare 1979 CRB Elettronica Oberon (triple-oscillator monophonic core with dedicated AM harmonic generator and Oberon Filter Ladder). Bottom MASTER section delivers the hidden amsynth log/exp VCA-style glue. Designed for intimate, inspiring AM (morning) sessions where powerful Italian analog tones sit warmly and 'hug' the instruments and vocals in the mix.
global_psychology: The instrument feels like playing the restored museum Oberon: dense, quirky, powerful Italian sound with ARP flexibility. Increasing PREAMP/DRIVE or engaging the red DRIVE button creates that magical 'everything suddenly sits perfectly' moment. The Oberon Filter Ladder gives snappy, dramatic resonance that can drop volume or self-oscillate musically — evoking the historical unit's unique character.

VCO_1_2_3.description: VCO 1 / VCO 2 / VCO 3 (Freq, Saw, Square, Sine, Pulse/PWM, Level)
VCO_1_2_3.psychology: Foundation & exploration. Low frequencies ground the sound; subtle detune and waveform mixing create living, breathing textures that feel historically authentic and emotionally warm.

VCF_24dB_LPF.description: 24dB LPF with Cutoff, Resonance, Key Track, Env, VCO Mod
VCF_24dB_LPF.psychology: Emotional shaping. Higher resonance adds singing quality and tension; patching modulation here makes tones evolve naturally, helping the sound 'hug' the rhythm section.

ENV_1.psychology: Tempo of feeling. Snappy settings = excitement and bite; longer envelopes = lush, reflective morning pads that blend effortlessly.

NOISE_GEN_S_H.psychology: Unpredictable life. Adds organic movement and subtle chaos — perfect for creating evolving textures that feel alive and sit naturally in a mix.

OSCILLATOR_A_B.description: Oscillator A & B (Pitch, Shape, Detune, Spread, Sub)
OSCILLATOR_A_B.psychology: The heart of the real CRB Oberon. Triple-oscillator architecture with dedicated AM from the third oscillator fattens leads and basses, creating huge yet intimate Italian analog power.

FILTER_2_Oberon_Ladder.description: Filter 2 (Cutoff, Resonance, Drive, Mode: LP / HP / BP / All-Pass, Routing, Serial/Parallel, Knobs)
FILTER_2_Oberon_Ladder.psychology: Dramatic Italian character. The 4-stage Oberon Filter Ladder delivers snappy resonance and can drop volume dramatically at high settings — the signature 'quirky yet musical' behavior of the museum unit. All-Pass mode adds unique phasing and depth.

ADSR_ENVELOPE.psychology: Emotional timing. Controls how the powerful Oberon tone breathes — short for plucky leads, long for velvet pads that emotionally connect with the listener.

PREAMP_DRIVE.psychology: Drive into soul. Pushes the triple-oscillator Oberon signal harder into the limiter and tape stages, creating warmth and density that makes vocals and instruments feel intimately hugged.

SOFT_LIMITER.psychology: Hidden VCA-style analog hug. The exact logarithmic soft-knee compression tames transients musically, giving console-like glue without harshness — the secret that makes everything sit perfectly in the mix.

TAPE_SATURATION.psychology: Emotional bonding agent. Adds harmonic warmth, gentle compression, and classic reel-to-reel sheen so the ARP modulation + Oberon power blends beautifully with drums, bass, and guitars.

RED_DRIVE_BUTTON.label: DRIVE (glowing red)
RED_DRIVE_BUTTON.psychology: Moment of revelation. Engaging the full secret chain (Preamp + Log Limiter + Tape) instantly transforms the sound into that 'this is why I make music in the AM' feeling — powerful yet perfectly placed.

Left_ARP_Rectifier.description: ARP 2600 Rectifier / Envelope Follower (diode full-wave + smoothing)
Left_ARP_Rectifier.psychology: Converts audio into expressive CV. When enabled (via red DRIVE button), it dynamically modulates the Oberon Filter Ladder — making vocals or any input 'hug' the synth tones with living, breathing movement. Classic ARP 2600 magic for intimate morning sessions.

recommended_presets.Morning_Vocal_Hug: Moderate Preamp (2.2), LP mode on Filter Ladder with medium resonance (4.5), subtle AM Depth, Tape Saturation engaged — vocals sit forward yet warmly blended.
recommended_presets.Italian_Lead_Power: High Preamp (3.8), Filter Mode HP or All-Pass, high resonance for dramatic character, red DRIVE button on.
recommended_presets.Velvet_Pad_Glue: Low Preamp (1.5), long ADSR envelopes, All-Pass mode, Tape Saturation high — lush pads that emotionally hug the entire track.
recommended_presets.ARP_Experiment: Heavy patching from left ARP section into Oberon AM and Filter Ladder, Secret Drive engaged for chaotic yet musical results.
